labels.devcard_knight_desc: Move Marsellus Wallace and steal a resource from an adjacent player
labels.devcard_mono_desc: Satisfy Mia's desires. Choose a resource: all other players hand over every card of that type.
labels.devcard_yop_desc: Take any 2 resources from the bank
labels.banner_robber: 🕴 Move Marsellus Wallace! Tap a hex.
labels.mob_robber_instruction: 🕴 Tap the board to move Marsellus Wallace
labels.setup_place_road_hint: Tap the board to place an Escape Route
labels.setup_place_sett_hint: Tap the board to place a Drug-Dealing Spot
labels.mob_build_label_road: Tap an edge for the Escape Route
labels.mob_build_label_settlement: Tap a vertex for the Drug-Dealing Spot
labels.mob_build_label_city: Tap a Drug-Dealing Spot to upgrade to Crime Den
labels.mob_build_label_robber: Tap a hex to move Marsellus Wallace

chapel.name: 🕰️ The Gold Watch
chapel.desc: "It was your father's watch. He hid it in the one place he knew he could hide something." — ⭐ +1 Victory Point

library.name: 💼 The Briefcase
library.desc: Nobody knows what's inside. Everyone wants it. — ⭐ +1 Victory Point

market.name: 🏍️ Zed's Chopper "Grace"
market.desc: "Zed's dead, baby. Zed's dead." — ⭐ +1 Victory Point

university.name: 🏆 Jack Rabbit Slim's Twist Trophy
university.desc: "You can dance, you can jive, having the time of your life." — ⭐ +1 Victory Point

palace.name: 👛 Bad Mother F***er Wallet
palace.desc: "The path of the righteous man is beset on all sides by the inequities of the selfish and the tyranny of evil men..." — ⭐ +1 Victory Point

yearOfPlenty.desc: "Any of you fucking pricks move, and I'll execute every motherfucking last one of you! Take any 2 resources from the bank."

roadBuilding.desc: "I'm Winston Wolfe. I solve problems. Build 2 Escape Routes for free."
